commands.review_summary:
The PR changes outbound channel fallback and recovery, session-lock Argus metadata, gateway session patch protocol, context-overflow detection, plain-text sanitization, and Telegram polling logs/tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection. The blockers can be exercised with an invalid explicit outbound channel plus mirrored delivery context, a silent delivery enqueued while user-visible work is pending, and a configured session.store outside dirname(sessionFile)/sessions.json.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer judgment on splitting or replacing the broad conflicting branch; automation cannot supply the contributor's runtime proof or settle the Argus/fallback contract safely.
